name: cap
title: Cap
description: Control Cap screen recorder from Raycast
author: cap

commands.name: start-recording
commands.title: Start Recording
commands.description: Start a new Cap screen recording

commands.name: stop-recording
commands.title: Stop Recording
commands.description: Stop the current Cap screen recording

commands.name: pause-recording
commands.title: Pause Recording
commands.description: Pause the current Cap screen recording

commands.name: resume-recording
commands.title: Resume Recording
commands.description: Resume the paused Cap screen recording

commands.name: toggle-recording
commands.title: Toggle Recording
commands.description: Toggle Cap screen recording on or off

commands.name: restart-recording
commands.title: Restart Recording
commands.description: Restart the current Cap screen recording

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
